transcription.text: worse a fan nothing much wrong there well actually there is leaving aside blades safety grills and limited settings the designs hardly changed since 1890. spinning blades chop the air causing annoying buffeting turn it off and you realize how unsettling it's been our solution uses air foil technology with no blades it can release a steady stream of smooth air she'll delve it she odelled it totally odelled it she was out of bounds i can't believe ovj is at this wedding i can't believe that convertible's a buick that convertible's a buick the all-new cascada convertible yes it's a buick i had a dream i got everything i wanted
